headline: Another airline cancels flights until August, refunds available
summary: With the security situation in the Middle East set off by the February U.S.-Israeli strike on Iran remaining highly volatile, airlines are forced to constantly push back their restart of flights into the region. Delta, American Airlines, British Airways, Lufthansa, Air France and KLM have all ...

headline: Berkshire Vs. Musk: Buffett Successor Bets On Only Big US Airline Not Using Starlink
summary: Berkshire Hathaway invested in one of the four largest US airline stocks in the first quarter. The airline is also the only of the four to be battling with Elon Musk.
